reference: I have pain that burns in my lower palate by the lower teeth area, my elbows burn, and the inner part of my shoulder also hurts. I am a forty-three-year-old woman. I have been ruled out as having a heart attack. No one has an answer. I do have back problems. What are the possibilities?
text: I have pain that burns in your stomach or your stomach area, my elbows burn, and the inner part of my shoulder also hurts my stomach. I am a 43-year-old woman. I have been ruled out as having a harder time. No one has an effort. I do have that problem. What are the possibilities?
